bead.title: auth-membership: tenant_users M:N CRUD + role ceiling helper
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] StorageAdapter::upsert_tenant_member and ::remove_tenant_member trait methods added
- [ ] All three adapters (memory, sqlite, postgres) implement both methods
- [ ] crates/axon-storage/tests/tenant_users_test.rs exists with 5 tests running on all backends
- [ ] TenantRole::delegable_ops() exists and returns correct set for each role
- [ ] TenantRole::enforce_ceiling(&Grants) exists and returns Err(GrantsExceedRole) on over-scoped requests
- [ ] AuthError::GrantsExceedRole variant exists; AUTH_ERROR_VARIANT_COUNT bumped to 15; exhaustive match updated
- [ ] status_code() returns 403 for GrantsExceedRole, error_code() returns "grants_exceed_role"
- [ ] PROP-009 property tests in crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs exercise all 3 roles × random grants, at least 1000 iterations
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-core green
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-storage green
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-server (all test files) still green
- [ ] cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean
